featureType.name: records
featureType.title: records
featureType.nativeCRS: GEOGCS["WGS 84", DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984", SPHEROID["WGS 84", 6378137.0, 298.257223563, AUTHORITY["EPSG","7030"]], AUTHORITY["EPSG","6326"]], PRIMEM["Greenwich", 0.0, AUTHORITY["EPSG","8901"]], UNIT["degree", 0.017453292519943295], AXIS["Geodetic longitude", EAST], AXIS["Geodetic latitude", NORTH], AUTHORITY["EPSG","4326"]]

virtualTable.name: records
virtualTable.sql: SELECT coords_wgs, validation_status, TO_CHAR(datum, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS datum, string_agg(auth.surname, ', ') AS name, rec.id FROM atlas.records AS rec, atlas.records_authors AS rel, atlas.authors AS auth WHERE rec.taxon_id = %TAXON_ID% AND rel.records_id = rec.id AND auth.id = rel.authors_id GROUP BY rec.id UNION SELECT coords_wgs, validation_status, TO_CHAR(datum, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS datum, '' AS name, rec.id FROM atlas.records AS rec WHERE rec.taxon_id = %TAXON_ID% AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM atlas.records_authors AS RA INNER JOIN atlas.authors AS A ON RA.authors_id=A.id WHERE rec.id = RA.records_id) GROUP BY rec.id
